summary: Iteration 43: Frontend UI improvements verification complete. All requested features working correctly - ScrollToTop resets page position on route change, PageHeader with dark mode toggle present on all key pages, Statistics page redesigned with bigger fonts and proper sections, Success Stories displays 4-column grid on desktop.
critical_code_review_comments: ScrollToTop.jsx correctly implemented - listens to pathname changes and calls window.scrollTo(0, 0)
PageHeader.jsx has all navigation links with proper data-testid attributes and dark mode toggle using useTheme hook
Statistics.jsx has proper sections: Platform Overview with big numbers (text-4xl to text-6xl), Key Insights, Ground Strength Distribution, Detailed Breakdown
SuccessStories.jsx uses correct 4-column grid: 'grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4'
ThemeContext.jsx properly manages theme state with localStorage persistence and toggleTheme function
Note: AppealStatisticsPage (/appeal-statistics) has its own header without PageHeader - this is a different page than Statistics (/statistics)

scroll_to_top.details: ScrollToTop component working - scroll resets to 0 on route change between pages

dark_mode_toggle_statistics.details: Theme toggle present and functional - HTML class changes from '' to 'dark' on click

details.platform_overview: Present with big numbers (71 Total Cases, 136 Documents, 62 Reports, 160 Grounds Found)
details.key_insights: Present with Most Common Offence, Top Appeal Ground (Sentencing Error), Busiest State
details.detailed_breakdown: Present with offence and state breakdowns

navigation_links.details: All nav links working: How It Works, Statistics, Legal Resources, Success Stories, FAQ, About

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified all UI improvements. Key findings: 1) ScrollToTop component in App.js resets scroll position on route change; 2) PageHeader shared component with dark mode toggle present on Statistics, Success Stories, FAQ, About, How It Works pages; 3) Statistics page (/statistics) has redesigned layout with big numbers and proper sections; 4) Success Stories shows 4-column grid on desktop (xl:grid-cols-4); 5) Navigation links all working correctly. Note: There are two statistics pages - /statistics (Case Statistics) uses PageHeader, /appeal-statistics (Australian Appeal Statistics) has its own header.
